rulings.Case Title: NAVEEN SINGHA VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Order And For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Dec. 14, 2012. Line 1 - PLAINTIFF NAVEEN SINGHA's Motion For Relief From Order And For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint. Grant 3rd amended complaint to be filed forthwith; Defendant failed to file opposition by December 7 as ordered by court. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MESHA MONGE-IRIZARRY VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Dec. 14, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as cause of action: 1 to allege duty re CC 2924b(c)(2) and breach of duty CC 2924g. 2 to allege fraud with particulority and reliance. 6 to allege all elements of breach of warranty of habitability, 3,4,5,7,8 to all allege tender (no opposition)=(501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Dec. 14, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A, and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to January 10, 2013 court's own motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEY RUSSELL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Ntc Of Demurrer To Complaint And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Dec. 14, 2012. Line 5 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION,and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s Amended Demurrer To Complaint. Sustain with leave to amend: 1st cause of action of violaiton of CCC 2923.5 to allege in good faith Defendant's violation of "due diligence: requirements. 2nd, 3rd, 4th causes of action to allege all elements of these causes of action and tender. 5th to allege present controversy non-duplicative of other causes of action and to re-allege injunctive relief as remedy. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEY RUSSELL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Dec. 14, 2012. Line 5 - Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction. Plaintiff's motion for Preliminary Injunction is denied, Plaintiff failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits. No opposition to supplemental brief Re CC 2923.5 and no objection to December 3, 2012 declartion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. KAREN MAHNKE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
